thag5.1:1.1: I, a monk, gone to the charnel ground,
thag5.1:2.4: as if I were blind to the oozings.
thag5.1:3.1: In less time than it takes for rice to cook,
thag5.1:3.2: I got out of that place.
thag5.1:4.1: Then apt attention arose in me,
thag5.1:4.4: disenchantment stood at an even keel:
thag5.1:5.1: With that, my heart was released.
thag5.1:5.3: The three knowledges have been attained;
